tabs.content:
SydneyFerries
| summarize latestTimestamp=max(timestamp) by ferry_name
| join kind=inner (
    SydneyFerries
    | project ferry_name, ferry_lat, ferry_long, timestamp
) on ferry_name, $left.latestTimestamp == $right.timestamp
| project ferry_name, ferry_lat, ferry_long, timestamp
